title: Verify the different entry points to Trial Corner
description: Tests that all specified entry points (homepage widget, floating pill, profile icon) for an active trial correctly navigate the user to the Trial Corner hub.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. On Day 0/1 of trial, locate and click the homepage widget.
2. Verify it navigates to the Trial Corner.
3. On Day 2 of trial, locate and click the homepage floating pill.
4. Verify it navigates to the Trial Corner.
5. Navigate to the user profile and find the 'Manage Trial' section/link.

expected_result: All specified entry points (widget, pill, manage trial link) must successfully redirect the user to the dedicated 'Trial Corner' page. The `trial-corner-widget-clicked` event should fire with the correct `which varient` attribute for each entry point.
